Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. A Decade of Slug 211 upvotes, 14 comments
  2. Unsloth Studio 56 upvotes, 4 comments
  3. FFmpeg 8.1 294 upvotes, 46 comments
  4. The Plumbing of Everyday Magic 29 upvotes, 2 comments
  5. Leanstral: Open-source agent for trustworthy coding and formal proof engineering 728 upvotes, 177 comments
  6. Kagi Small Web 639 upvotes, 182 comments
  7. Building a Shell 143 upvotes, 34 comments
  8. Python 3.15's JIT is now back on track 117 upvotes, 29 comments
  9. Finding a CPU Design Bug in the Xbox 360 (2018) 141 upvotes, 41 comments
  10. It Took Me 30 Years to Solve This VFX Problem – Green Screen Problem [video] 75 upvotes, 23 comments
  11. Microsoft's 'unhackable' Xbox One has been hacked by 'Bliss' 407 upvotes, 166 comments
  12. Show HN: Antfly: Distributed, Multimodal Search and Memory and Graphs in Go 66 upvotes, 21 comments
  13. Edge.js: Run Node apps inside a WebAssembly sandbox 46 upvotes, 14 comments
  14. 'The Secret Agent': Exploring a Vibrant, yet Violent Brazil (2025) 91 upvotes, 36 comments
  15. Reverse-engineering Viktor and making it open source 139 upvotes, 60 comments
  16. Font Smuggler – Copy hidden brand fonts into Google Docs 142 upvotes, 69 comments
  17. Get Shit Done: A Meta-Prompting, Context Engineering and Spec-Driven Dev System 48 upvotes, 19 comments
  18. Torturing Rustc by Emulating HKTs 9 upvotes, 1 comments
  19. Show HN: Crust – A CLI framework for TypeScript and Bun 47 upvotes, 19 comments
  20. GPT‑5.4 Mini and Nano 172 upvotes, 102 comments
  21. Meta and TikTok let harmful content rise to drove engagement, say whistleblowers 61 upvotes, 30 comments
  22. Ryugu asteroid samples contain all DNA and RNA building blocks 138 upvotes, 88 comments
  23. Show HN: Horizon – GPU-accelerated infinite-canvas terminal in Rust 21 upvotes, 8 comments
  24. OpenSUSE Kalpa 106 upvotes, 69 comments
  25. Show HN: March Madness Bracket Challenge for AI Agents Only 54 upvotes, 32 comments
  26. Java 26 is here 94 upvotes, 68 comments
  27. Toward automated verification of unreviewed AI-generated code 65 upvotes, 49 comments
  28. Node.js needs a virtual file system 168 upvotes, 150 comments
  29. Honda is killing its EVs 113 upvotes, 129 comments
  30. Spice Data (YC S19) Is Hiring a Product Specialist 0 upvotes, 0 comments
